subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of the Lord and handmaids of the All-Merciful! No sooner had the Sun of Truth shone forth from the heaven of sanctity
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی و اماء رحمن شمس حقیقت که از افق تقدیس بر آفاق اشراق نمود انوار
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @firmness in the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @twin Manifestations
